dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: Long ago, a selkie’s skin was stolen by an old sailor. When a selkie’s skin is taken she is trapped in human form and can no longer return to the sea, only yearn for it.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: He took my skin from me. Without it I do not belong anywhere, not on land and not in the sea. I have to find it.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: What remains of her stolen skin lies scattered across broken docks and drifting platforms above the open ocean.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: You will need to move across these docks. Jump carefully from one to the next. Your timing matters.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Some docks are further apart than they seem. Move with enough speed before you jump or you may not make it.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Fragments of your seal skin are scattered along this path. Collect them to begin restoring what was taken from you.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: I can feel them. Pieces of myself, lost and waiting for me to reclaim them. I will not leave them behind.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: The particles you see mark checkpoints. Step on them to save your progress.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: If you fall into the ocean you will return to the last checkpoint you reached, but you will lose a life.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: The ocean below is not a way home. Not yet.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: It is calling me. I can hear it, but I cannot go back like this, with legs. I will only be worthy with a tail.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Reach the final platform to complete this level and continue your journey back to the sea.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: With every step forward she moves closer to the sea, and closer to becoming herself again.
